name: Saka
title: The Code Seeker
bio: Main protagonist. Brave, emotional, and determined. Blue hair with a red scarf. Mysteriously connected to the world's core code.

passives.name: Code Sense
passives.description: Critical-hit rate rises sharply while HP is low.

passives.name: Adaptive Learner
passives.description: Gains a small permanent stat boost after surviving tough battles.

name: Kara
title: The Code Wielder
bio: Saka's older sister. Calm, intelligent, and caring. Purple ponytail. Wields an ancient magic staff.

passives.name: Code Mastery
passives.description: Increases magic critical rate and overall spell effectiveness.

passives.name: Ancient Insight
passives.description: Support and debuff effects last longer.

name: Zell
title: The Code Engineer
bio: Childhood best friend. Funny and loyal. An engineer who fights with a massive mechanical hammer and wears goggles around his neck.

passives.name: Tech Savant
passives.description: Deals bonus critical damage against machine-type enemies.

passives.name: Tinkerer
passives.description: Repair and item effects are more powerful.
